article.description: — Donovan Mitchell had 35 points and nine assists, Darius Garland scored 20 points before leaving with an injured foot and the Cleveland Cavaliers beat the Philadelphia 76ers 133-107 on Wednesday night.
article.headline: Mitchell has 35 points to power Cavs past 76ers 133-107 but Garland exits with foot injury

images.caption: Cavs' Garland out at least a week with toe sprain
images.name: Cavs' Garland out at least a week with toe sprain

article.linkText: Mitchell has 35 points to power Cavs past 76ers 133-107 but Garland exits with foot injury
article.story: PHILADELPHIA -- — Donovan Mitchell had 35 points and nine assists, Darius Garland scored 20 points before leaving with an injured foot and the Cleveland Cavaliers beat the Philadelphia 76ers 133-107 on Wednesday night. Garland was ruled out for the game late in the third quarter when he hurt his right foot diving for a loose ball. Garland already had surgery in June on the injured left big toe that hampered him during Cleveland’s exit from the playoffs. The All-Star guard averaged 17.9 points after a slow start this season as he recovered from surgery. Garland continued his recent hot streak and shot 8 for 13 against the 76ers. Garland averaged 20.6 points and 6.7 assists during the regular season to help the Cavs finish atop the Eastern Conference. Joel Embiid scored 20 points and hit a 3-pointer that helped him reach 13,000 career points, the seventh player in team history to hit that mark. Paul George had 17 points for the Sixers in the opener of a two-game series. Sixers fans booed the team off the court in the third quarter headed into a timeout and trailing 75-53. Tyrese Maxey and Quintin Grimes hit a pair of 3s during a 10-0 run and Embiid — who just earlier landed his 7-foot-2 frame on two rows of unsuspecting fans when he dove for a loose ball — buried a 3 that made it 79-66. The good times were short-lived, and fans headed for the exits as the Cavs stretched the lead to 22 midway through the fourth. Sixers forward Dom Barlow needed help up from the court and into the locker room after his legs gave out on him and he landed hard on his back and head on a driving layup attempt. He suffered a back contusion. De'Andre Hunter hit early 3s that stretched Cleveland's lead to 30-14 and 60-47 headed into halftime. Hunter and Evan Mobley both scored 17 points. Mobley grabbed 13 rebounds. Up next The teams play again Friday. ------ AP NBA: https://apnews.com/hub/nba

images.credit: Jesse D. Garrabrant/NBAE via Getty Images

images.alt: Jalen Brunson

images.name: Jalen Brunson [608x342]

images.alt: Jalen Brunson
images.caption: The Knicks are now heavy favorites to win the Eastern Conference after taking a 3-0 series lead over the Cavs.
images.credit: Nathaniel S. Butler/NBAE via Getty Images
images.name: Jalen Brunson [608x342]

images.name: OKC Thunder [1296x729]

images.caption: Shai Gilgeous-Alexander and the Thunder enter the playoffs as the favorites to win it all.
images.name: Shai Gilgeous-Alexander [1296x729]

images.alt: Jayson Tatum #0 of the Boston Celtics dribbles the ball during the game against the New York Knicks on April 9, 2026 at Madison Square Garden in New York City, New York.
images.caption: Jayson Tatum averaged 21.8 PPG in 16 regular-season games leading up to the playoffs.
images.credit: Nathaniel S. Butler/NBAE via Getty Images
images.name: Jayson Tatum [1296x729]

images.alt: Los Angeles Lakers guard Austin Reaves (15) shoots over Minnesota Timberwolves center Naz Reid (11) during game 5 of the first round of the NBA Western Conference Playoffs between the Minnesota Timberwolves and the Los Angeles Lakers on April 30, 2025.
images.caption: The Lakers miss the perimeter shooting that Austin Reaves provides.
images.name: Austin Reaves [1296x729]

images.alt: Luka Doncic #77 of the Los Angeles Lakers handles the ball during the game against the Miami Heat on March 19, 2026 at Kaseya Center in Miami, Florida.
images.caption: The Lakers' championship odds are on the move again after Luka Doncic's injury.
images.name: Luka Doncic [1296x729]

images.alt: Los Angeles Lakers forward LeBron James (23) scores on a breakaway dunk during the first half of an NBA basketball game against the Orlando Magic, Saturday, March 21, 2026, in Orlando, Fla.
images.caption: LeBron James and the Lakers are on a roll as March winds down.
images.name: LeBron James  [1296x729]

images.alt: Victor Wembanyama #1 of the San Antonio Spurs handles the ball during the game against the Detroit Pistons on March 5, 2026 at the Frost Bank Center in San Antonio, Texas.
images.caption: Victor Wembanyama and the Spurs continue to see their championship odds shift.
images.name: Victor Wembanyama [1296x729]

images.alt: Jayson Tatum #0 of the Boston Celtics celebrates after scoring against the Dallas Mavericks during the second quarter at TD Garden on March 06, 2026 in Boston, Massachusetts.
images.caption: The Celtics' title odds have shortened since Jayson Tatum's return last week.
images.name: Jayson Tatum [1296x729]

images.alt: Victor Wembanyama #1 and Devin Vassell #24 of the San Antonio Spurs looks on during the game against the New Orleans Pelicans on January 25, 2026 at the Frost Bank Center in San Antonio, Texas.
images.caption: Led by Victor Wembanyama, the Spurs continue to see their NBA championship odds shorten.
images.name: Victor Wembanyama [1296x729]

images.alt: Cade Cunningham #2 of the Detroit Pistons handles the ball during the game against the Denver Nuggets on February 3, 2026 at Little Caesars Arena in Detroit, Michigan.
images.name: Cade Cunningham [1296x729]

images.alt: Oklahoma City Thunder guard Shai Gilgeous-Alexander (2) against the Phoenix Suns in the first half at Mortgage Matchup Center.
images.caption: Even after a rough stretch of games, the Thunder remain the heavy favorites to win the NBA championship.
images.name: Shai Gilgeous-Alexander [1296x729]

images.alt: Cleveland Cavaliers guard Donovan Mitchell (45) against the Phoenix Suns in the first half at Mortgage Matchup Center.
images.caption: Adding James Harden to a talented roster with the likes of Donovan Mitchell gives the Cavs a higher upside this season.
images.name: Donovan Mitchell [1296x729]

images.alt: Jaylen Brown #7 of the Boston Celtics shoots against the Portland Trail Blazers at TD Garden on January 26, 2026 in Boston, Massachusetts.
images.caption: The Celtics now have shorter odds to win the NBA title than the Spurs, Rockets, Knicks and Pistons.
images.name: Jaylen Brown [1296x729]

images.alt: Jamal Murray #27 of the Denver Nuggets dribbles the ball during the game against the Dallas Mavericks on January 14, 2026 at American Airlines Center in Dallas, Texas.
images.caption: Jamal Murray has led the Nuggets while Nikola Jokic recovers from injury.
images.name: Jamal Murray  [1296x729]

images.alt: Victor Wembanyama #1 of the San Antonio Spurs looks on during the game against the Cleveland Cavaliers on December 29, 2025 at the Frost Bank Center in San Antonio, Texas.
images.caption: Victor Wembanyama and the Spurs have seen their odds to win the NBA championship shorten in the past week.
images.name: Victor Wembanyama [1296x729]

videos.description: Cleveland Cavaliers vs. Philadelphia 76ers: Game Highlights
videos.headline: Cleveland Cavaliers vs. Philadelphia 76ers: Game Highlights

tracking.trackingName: NBA_One-Play (Cleveland Cavaliers vs. Philadelphia 76ers: Game Highlights) 2026/01/15 ESHEET

videos.description: Paul George pulls up from the baseline and drops in a jumper while drawing contact.
videos.headline: PG drops in a baseline and-1 for the Sixers

tracking.trackingName: NBA_One-Play (PG drops in a baseline and-1 for the Sixers) 2026/01/15 ESHEET

videos.description: Donovan Mitchell flies to the rack and kisses a layup off the glass for the Cavaliers.
videos.headline: Donovan Mitchell banks in layup for the Cavs

tracking.trackingName: NBA_One-Play (Donovan Mitchell banks in layup for the Cavs) 2026/01/15 ESHEET

videos.description: Darius Garland pulls up from way downtown and knocks down the 3-pointer for the Cavaliers.
videos.headline: Darius Garland cashes in on a deep trey

tracking.trackingName: NBA_One-Play (Darius Garland cashes in on a deep trey) 2026/01/15 ESHEET

videos.description: Joel Embiid gets called for his second traveling violation of the first quarter and slams the ball in frustration.
videos.headline: Joel Embiid frustrated after 2nd travel of the 1st quarter

tracking.trackingName: NBA_One-Play (Joel Embiid frustrated after 2nd travel of the 1st quarter) 2026/01/15 ESHEET

videos.description: Paul George drops in a 3-pointer from top of the key for the 76ers.
videos.headline: PG sinks a 3-pointer for Philly

tracking.trackingName: NBA_One-Play (PG sinks a 3-pointer for Philly) 2026/01/15 ESHEET

videos.description: Paul George drains a tough jumper off glass while drawing a foul for Philadelphia.
videos.headline: PG calls bank on and-1 for the Sixers

tracking.trackingName: NBA_One-Play (PG calls bank on and-1 for the Sixers) 2026/01/15 ESHEET

videos.description: Jarrett Allen gets the ball near the rack and muscles in an and-1 for the Cavaliers.
videos.headline: Jarrett Allen sticks with it on tough and-1

tracking.trackingName: NBA_One-Play (Jarrett Allen sticks with it on tough and-1) 2026/01/15 ESHEET

videos.description: Evan Mobley eases in a floater while drawing contact for the Cavaliers.
videos.headline: Evan Mobley floats in and-1 for Cleveland

tracking.trackingName: NBA_One-Play (Evan Mobley floats in and-1 for Cleveland) 2026/01/15 ESHEET

videos.description: Darius Garland drives along the baseline and drops in an easy layup for Cleveland.
videos.headline: Darius Garland goes baseline for an easy bucket

tracking.trackingName: NBA_One-Play (Darius Garland goes baseline for an easy bucket) 2026/01/15 ESHEET

videos.description: Tyrese Maxey pulls up from the corner and sinks a 3-pointer for the 76ers.
videos.headline: Tyrese Maxey drops one in from the corner

tracking.trackingName: NBA_One-Play (Tyrese Maxey drops one in from the corner) 2026/01/15 ESHEET

videos.description: Joel Embiid flies into the second row going for a loose ball and the 76ers fans are loving it.
videos.headline: Crowd erupts after Embiid goes crashing into the stands

tracking.trackingName: NBA_One-Play (Crowd erupts after Embiid goes crashing into the stands) 2026/01/15 ESHEET

videos.description: Tyrese Maxey breaks away for a jam as Darius Garland goes down with injury.
videos.headline: Tyrese Maxey breaks away for a jam

tracking.trackingName: NBA_One-Play (Tyrese Maxey breaks away for a jam) 2026/01/15 ESHEET

videos.description: Evan Mobley forces his way to the rack for a tough and-1 in the fourth quarter for Cleveland.
videos.headline: Evan Mobley muscles in an and-1

tracking.trackingName: NBA_One-Play (Evan Mobley muscles in an and-1) 2026/01/15 ESHEET

videos.description: Donovan Mitchell scores 35 points with nine assists in the Cavaliers' big win over the 76ers.
videos.headline: Donovan Mitchell drops 35 points to lead Cavs to victory

tracking.trackingName: COM_NBA Highlight (Donovan Mitchell drops 35 points to lead Cavs to victory) 2026/01/15 ESHEET SOTFULL
